sections.purpose: Global high-signal stories with broad relevance.
anti_patterns: Entertainment/social spillover without gold support
Weak local stories outranking globally important stories
Duplicate event clusters occupying multiple top positions

sections.purpose: Nationally relevant stories for India-focused daily use.
quality_expectations: Strong top-10 recall for important India stories
Low festival noise leak into serious coverage
Freshness and source quality should matter
anti_patterns: Generic entertainment/social chatter treated as India lead stories
Stale explainers or repetitive commentary in top slots

quality_expectations: Good alert and civic relevance when present
anti_patterns: Weak local filler overpromotion
Irrelevant national/global bleed into local top slots
Weak local filler overpromotion
Irrelevant spillover from Chennai/local/general feeds

sections.purpose: Broader local/regional relevance beyond city-only sections.
anti_patterns: Generic low-signal local filler
Same-event repetition across nearby stories

sections.purpose: Business and economy stories with daily decision value.
anti_patterns: Holiday sale chatter treated as business lead story without real economic relevance
Opinion/explainer clutter in top ranks

sections.purpose: Technology, startup, and product ecosystem stories.
quality_expectations: Strong relevance for major tech stories
anti_patterns: Rumour/speculation overpromotion
Festival or shopping chatter leaking into tech without strong fit

sections.purpose: Sports headlines with current interest and schedule value.
anti_patterns: Opinion/prediction clutter
Low-value recap spam outranking meaningful match/event stories

sections.purpose: Entertainment coverage with genuine current interest.
quality_expectations: Fresh releases and major entertainment news should surface well
anti_patterns: Gossip or weak filler dominating section
Same release story repeated too many times

quality_expectations: Useful as a contained trend bucket, not as feed distortion source
anti_patterns: Bleeding into serious sections
Driving overall ranking distortion outside its section
